revision.text:
'''巨勢氏'''（こせうじ）は[[大和国]][[高市郡]]巨勢郷を本拠とした古代豪族。許勢・居勢とも書く。
『記紀』によると武内宿禰の五男、許勢小柄宿禰を祖する。巨勢臣・雀部（ささきべ）臣・軽部臣につながる。6世紀以降、集中的に『日本書紀』に現れる。
*継体紀：[[巨勢男人]]が[[大臣]]となり紗手媛・香々有媛を[[安閑天皇]]に嫁がせる。 *[[丁未の乱]]では[[巨勢臣比良夫]]が従軍し、[[物部大連守屋]]を滅ぼす。 *[[巨勢徳陀]]は[[左大臣]]となる。 *壬申の乱の時、巨勢人・巨勢奈弖麻呂親子は近江方につき乱後、刑死。 *天武12年、巨勢黒麿が朝臣姓を賜る。 *徳川吉宗の母お由利の方は巨勢氏の出と言われる。
== 関連項目 == *[[巨勢人]] *[[巨勢奈弖麻呂]] *[[お由利の方]] *[[徳川吉宗]] *[[巨勢派]] *[[巨勢金岡]]
== 外部リンク == [http://www.myj7000.jp-biz.net/clan/01/012/01227.htm 日本の苗字七千傑 巨勢氏]
{{Japanese-history-stub|こせうし}} {{people-stub|こせうし}}
[[Category:巨勢氏|*]] [[Category:飛鳥時代|こせうし]] [[Category:近畿地方の歴史|こせうし]]

'''巨勢氏'''（こせうじ）は[[大和国]][[高市郡]]巨勢郷を本拠とした古代[[豪族]]。許勢、居勢とも書く。

*継体紀：[[巨勢男人]]が[[大臣]]となり紗手媛・香々有媛を[[安閑天皇]]に嫁がせる。 *[[丁未の乱]]では[[巨勢臣比良夫]]が従軍し、[[物部守屋|物部大連守屋]]を滅ぼす。 *[[巨勢徳陀]]は[[左大臣]]となる。 *[[壬申の乱]]の時、[[巨勢人]]・[[巨勢奈弖麻呂]]親子は近江方につき乱後、刑死。 *天武12年、[[巨勢黒麿]]が[[朝臣]]姓を賜る。 *[[徳川吉宗]]の母お由利の方は巨勢氏の出と言われる。

'''巨勢氏'''（こせうじ）は[[大和国]][[高市郡]]巨勢郷を本拠とした古代[[豪族]]。許勢、居勢とも書く。
『記紀』によると[[武内宿禰]]の五男、許勢小柄宿禰を祖する。巨勢臣・雀部（ささきべ）臣・軽部臣につながる。[[6世紀]]以降、集中的に『[[日本書紀]]』に現れる。
*継体紀：[[巨勢男人]]が[[大臣]]となり紗手媛・香々有媛を[[安閑天皇]]に嫁がせる。 *[[用明天皇|用明]]2年([[587年]])[[物部守屋の変|丁未の乱]]では[[巨勢臣比良夫]]が従軍し、[[物部守屋|物部大連守屋]]を滅ぼす。 *[[大化]]5年([[649年]])[[巨勢徳陀]]は[[左大臣]]となる。 *[[672年]][[壬申の乱]]の時、[[巨勢人]]・[[巨勢奈弖麻呂]]親子は近江方につき乱後、刑死。 *[[天武天皇|天武]]13年([[684年]])、巨勢徳陀の子[[巨勢黒麿]]が[[朝臣]]姓を賜る。 *[[徳川吉宗]]の母お由利の方は巨勢氏の出と言われる。

revision.comment: 巨勢人の刑死は誤り。関連項目への重出を削る

[[紀州徳川家]]属[[旗本]]家 2家（[[武家]]） }} '''巨勢氏'''（こせうじ）は[[大和国]][[高市郡]]巨勢郷を本拠とした[[古代]][[豪族]]。許勢、居勢とも書く。 __TOC__ {{-}} == 始祖 == 『記紀』によると[[武内宿禰]]の五男、許勢小柄宿禰を祖する。巨勢臣・雀部（ささきべ）臣・軽部臣につながる。[[6世紀]]以降、集中的に『[[日本書紀]]』に現れる。 == 動向 == * 継体紀：[[巨勢男人]]が[[大臣]]となり紗手媛・香々有媛を[[安閑天皇]]に嫁がせる。 * [[用明天皇|用明]]2年([[587年]])[[物部守屋の変|丁未の乱]]では[[巨勢臣比良夫]]が従軍し、[[物部守屋|物部大連守屋]]を滅ぼす。 * [[大化]]5年([[649年]])[[巨勢徳陀]]は[[左大臣]]となる。 * [[672年]][[壬申の乱]]の時、[[巨勢人]]・[[巨勢奈弖麻呂]]親子は近江方につき乱後流刑。奈弖麻呂は後に[[大納言]]。 * [[天武天皇|天武]]13年([[684年]])、巨勢徳陀の子[[巨勢黒麿]]が[[朝臣]]姓を賜る。 * [[徳川吉宗]]の生母、お由利の方は巨勢氏の出と言われる。 == 関連項目 == * [[巨勢派]] * [[巨勢金岡]] == 外部リンク == * [http://www.myj7000.jp-biz.net/clan/01/012/01227.htm 日本の苗字七千傑 巨勢氏] {{ja icon}} {{Japanese-history-stub|こせうし}} {{people-stub|こせうし}} [[Category:日本の氏族|こせ]] [[Category:巨勢氏|*]] [[Category:本姓|こせ]] [[Category:飛鳥時代|こせうし]] [[Category:近畿地方の歴史|こせうし]]

revision.comment: テンプレートを[[Template:日本の氏族 (古代氏族)]]に移行、カテゴリを[[Category:氏]]に移行、序文表記統一。
[[Special:Contributions/Imatom|Imatom]] ([[User talk:Imatom|会話]]) による ID:50882825 の版を[[H:RV|取り消し]]巨勢部は部曲であり別姓
古代氏族の読みを修正。
/* 外部リンク */ Category:御所市の歴史

+{{[[Template:Sfn|Sfn]]}}、+{{[[Template:要出典範囲|要出典範囲]]}}〈同文文末にある出典にはない記述であることを明示するため〉、{{読み仮名}}→{{読み}}〈内部リンク先に読み仮名があるが、複数の読み方があるためスクリーンリーダー用に変更〉、{{[[Template:オープンアクセス|オープンアクセス]]}}→{{[[Template:フリーアクセス|フリーアクセス]]}}、冗長な書誌情報除去、[[WP:RS]]を満たしていないと考えられる外部リンクをコメントアウト、見出し「外部リンク」コメントアウト

revision.text:
[[ja:巨勢氏]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11479778]] Wikidata name: Kose clan [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:39, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11479778]] Wikidata name: Kose clan [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:18, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} ]] ) --> {{translated page|ja|巨勢氏|version=90698167|comment=Imported full ja history}} |始祖 = |出自 = |氏祖 = {{ill|Kose Komagari Sukune|de|Kose Komagari Sukune|ja|許勢小柄宿禰|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Komagari Sukune|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 許勢小柄|1=Kose-no-Ogara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q18226524}}{{Sfn|太田|1934|p=2310}} |種別 = {{ill|Imperial Branch|de|Imperial Branch|ja|皇別|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Branch|qq=|1=Kōbetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11581000}} |本貫 = [[:en:Yamato Province|Yamato Province]][[:en:Takaichi District, Nara|Takaichi District]]Kose District (巨勢郷){{Sfn|太田|1934|p=2310}} |人物 = {{ill|Kose Otoko|de|Kose Otoko|ja|巨勢男人|lt=Man|lt_ja=男人|lt_de=Man|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Otoko|qq=|1=Kose Otoko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479782}}
{{ill|Kose Hirao|de|Kose Hirao|ja|巨勢比良夫|lt=Hirao|lt_ja=比良夫|lt_de=Hirao|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Hirao|qq=|1=Kose Hirao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q96715944}}
{{ill|Kose Tokuda|de|Kose Tokuda|ja|巨勢徳陀|lt=Tokuda|lt_ja=徳陀|lt_de=Tokuda|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Tokuda|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 巨勢徳多|1=Kose no Tokuta|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479774}}
{{ill|Kose Hito|de|Kose Hito|ja|巨勢人|lt=Hito|lt_ja=人|lt_de=Hito|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Hito|qq=|1=Kose no Hito|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479766}}
{{ill|Kose Neta Maro|de|Kose Neta Maro|ja|巨勢奈弖麻呂|lt=Neta Maro|lt_ja=奈弖麻呂|lt_de=Neta Maro|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Neta Maro|qq=|1=Kose no Natemaro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479771}}
{{ill|Kose Noashi|de|Kose Noashi|ja|巨勢野足|lt=Noashi|lt_ja=野足|lt_de=Noashi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Noashi|qq=|1=Kose no Notari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479784}}
[[:en:Kose Kanaoka|Kanaoka]]
{{ill|Jōen-in|de|Jōen-in|ja|浄円院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōen-in|qq=|1=Jōen-in|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6992748}} ? |後裔 = [[:en:Kishū Tokugawa family|Kishu Tokugawa Family]] subordinate [[:en:Hatamoto|Hatamoto]] 2 houses ([[:en:Buke|Buke]]) }} '''Kose Clan''' (巨勢氏) is a [[:en:Clan|clan]] that adopts “Kose” as its clan name. It was an [[:en:Ancient history|Ancient]] [[:en:Gōzoku|Powerful Clan]] based in [[:en:Yamato Province|Yamato Province]][[:en:Takaichi District, Nara|Takaichi District]]Kose District (巨勢郷) (present‐day [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]][[:en:Gose, Nara|Gose City]] Furuse (古瀬)){{Sfn|太田|1934|p=2310}}. The orthography of “Kose” is attested as '''Kose''' (許勢), , '''Kose''' (居勢), and {{Sfn|太田|1934|p=2310}}. The [[:en:Kabane|Surname]] was originally read as {{reading|[[:en:Omi (title)|Omi]]|o‑mi}}, and in the 13th year of [[:en:Emperor Tenmu|Emperor Tenmu]] ([[:en:684|684 AD]]), with the establishment of the {{ill|Eight Family Names|de|Acht Familiennamen|ja|八色の姓|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Family Names|qq=|1=eight kabane system|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11391729}}, it was changed to the surname [[:en:Ason|Asomi]]{{Sfn|太田|1934|p=2311}}. == Overview == According to traditions such as the [[:en:Kiki|Kiki]], the clan is said to descend from [[:en:Emperor Kōgen|Emperor Kogen]], with its founder being {{ill|Kose Komagari Sukune|de|Kose Komagari Sukune|ja|許勢小柄宿禰|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Komagari Sukune|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 許勢小柄|1=Kose-no-Ogara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q18226524}}, the second son of [[:en:Takenouchi no Sukune|Takenouchi no Sukune]]{{Sfn|太田|1934|p=2310}}. After the 6th Century [[:en:6th century|6th Century]], the clan emerged as a rising new power through its diplomatic and military engagements with the {{ill|Korean Peninsula|de|Koreanische Halbinsel|ja|朝鮮半島|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Korean Peninsula|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Korean Peninsula|WD=Q483134}}. Beginning with {{ill|Kose Otoko|de|Kose Otoko|ja|巨勢男人|lt=Man|lt_ja=男人|lt_de=Man|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Otoko|qq=|1=Kose Otoko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479782}}, who became a {{ill|Minister (Ancient Japan)|de|Minister (Altes Japan)|ja|大臣 (古代日本)|lt=Minister|lt_ja=大臣|lt_de=Minister|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minister (Ancient Japan)|qq=|1=Ōomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4328809}} in the reign of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]], followed by {{ill|Kose Inamochi|de|Kose Inamochi|ja|許勢稲持|lt=Inamochi|lt_ja=稲持|lt_de=Inamochi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Inamochi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 巨勢稲持|1=Kose Inamochi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q90866601}} in the reign of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Emperor Kinmei]], {{ill|Kose Saru|de|Kose Saru|ja|巨勢猿|lt=Saru|lt_ja=猿|lt_de=Saru|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Saru|qq=|1=Kose no Saru|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q66480252}} and {{ill|Kose Hirao|de|Kose Hirao|ja|巨勢比良夫|lt=Hirao|lt_ja=比良夫|lt_de=Hirao|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Hirao|qq=|1=Kose Hirao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q96715944}} in the reign of [[:en:Emperor Sushun|Emperor Sushun]], and {{ill|Kose Daimaro|de|Kose Daimaro|ja|許勢大摩呂|lt=Daimaro|lt_ja=大摩呂|lt_de=Daimaro|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Daimaro|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in the reign of [[:en:Empress Suiko|Empress Suiko]], members of the clan appear as officials of the [[:en:Taifu|Daihu]] (councilor) class{{Sfn|太田|1934|p=2311}}, though their genealogical relationships remain unclear. In the [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka Period]], during the reign of [[:en:Emperor Kōtoku|Emperor Kōtoku]], {{ill|Kose Tokuda|de|Kose Tokuda|ja|巨勢徳陀|lt=Tokuda|lt_ja=徳陀|lt_de=Tokuda|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Tokuda|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 巨勢徳多|1=Kose no Tokuta|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479774}} served as [[:en:Minister of the Left|Minister of the Left]], and in the reign of [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]], {{ill|Kose Hito|de|Kose Hito|ja|巨勢人|lt=Hito|lt_ja=人|lt_de=Hito|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Hito|qq=|1=Kose no Hito|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479766}} served as {{ill|Censorial Official|de|Zensor|ja|御史大夫|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Censorial Official|qq=|1=yushi dafu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11071155}}; moreover, in the [[:en:Nara period|Nara Period]], {{ill|Kose Maro|de|Kose Maro|ja|巨勢麻呂|lt=Maro|lt_ja=麻呂|lt_de=Maro|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Maro|qq=|1=Kose no Maro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479786}} and {{ill|Kose Eji|de|Kose Eji|ja|巨勢邑治|lt=Eji|lt_ja=邑治|lt_de=Eji|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Eji|qq=|1=Kose Eji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479785}} held the position of [[:en:Chūnagon|Chunagon]], while {{ill|Kose Neta Maro|de|Kose Neta Maro|ja|巨勢奈弖麻呂|lt=Neta Maro|lt_ja=奈弖麻呂|lt_de=Neta Maro|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Neta Maro|qq=|1=Kose no Natemaro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479771}} was promoted to [[:en:Dainagon|Dainagon]]{{Sfn|太田|1934|p=2311}}. In the early [[:en:Heian period|Heian Period]], after producing {{ill|Kose Noashi|de|Kose Noashi|ja|巨勢野足|lt=Noashi|lt_ja=野足|lt_de=Noashi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Noashi|qq=|1=Kose no Notari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479784}}, who was first appointed as {{ill|Kurando-tō|de|Kurando-tō|ja|蔵人頭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurando-tō|qq=|1=Kurōdonotō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11621873}} and later promoted to [[:en:Chūnagon|Chunagon]], no other member rose to the level of court nobility. [[:en:Kose Kanaoka|Kanaoka]], the founder of the {{ill|Kose School|de|Kose Schule|ja|巨勢派|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose School|qq=|1=Kose school|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479780}}, was a great‑grandson of Noashi. == Developments == * Early 6th Century – In the reign of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]], {{ill|Kose Otoko|de|Kose Otoko|ja|巨勢男人|lt=Man|lt_ja=男人|lt_de=Man|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Otoko|qq=|1=Kose Otoko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479782}} became a [[:en:Minister (government)|Minister]], and his daughters {{ill|Sadehime|de|Sadehime|ja|紗手媛|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadehime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|Kakayuhime|de|Kakayuhime|ja|香々有媛|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakayuhime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} were married to [[:en:Emperor Ankan|Emperor Ankan]]. * In Year 2 of [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]] ([[:en:587|587 AD]]) – {{ill|Kose Hirao|de|Kose Hirao|ja|巨勢比良夫|lt=Hirao|lt_ja=比良夫|lt_de=Hirao|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Hirao|qq=|1=Kose Hirao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q96715944}} participated in the [[:en:Soga–Mononobe conflict|Teimei Rebellion]] and annihilated [[:en:Mononobe no Moriya|Mononobe Moriya]]. * In Year 5 of the [[:en:Taika (era)|Taika Era]] ([[:en:649|649 AD]]) – {{ill|Kose Tokuda|de|Kose Tokuda|ja|巨勢徳陀|lt=Tokuda|lt_ja=徳陀|lt_de=Tokuda|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Tokuda|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 巨勢徳多|1=Kose no Tokuta|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479774}} became [[:en:Minister of the Left|Minister of the Left]]. * In Year 1 of [[:en:Emperor Tenmu|Emperor Tenmu]] ([[:en:672|672 AD]]) – {{ill|Kose Hito|de|Kose Hito|ja|巨勢人|lt=Hito|lt_ja=人|lt_de=Hito|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Hito|qq=|1=Kose no Hito|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479766}} sided with the Omi faction in the [[:en:Jinshin War|Jinshin War]] and was sentenced to [[:en:Exile|Exile]]. * In Year 13 of Emperor Tenmu ([[:en:684|684 AD]]) – {{ill|Kose Kuromaro|de|Kose Kuromaro|ja|巨勢黒麻呂|lt=Kuromaro|lt_ja=黒麻呂|lt_de=Kuromaro|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Kuromaro|qq=|1=Kose no Kurohito|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q109287613}} and {{ill|Kose Shitan|de|Kose Shitan|ja|巨勢紫檀|lt=Shitan|lt_ja=紫檀|lt_de=Shitan|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Shitan|qq=|1=Kose Shitan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30932551}} were granted the surname [[:en:Ason|Asomi]]. * In Year 1 of [[:en:Tenpyō-shōhō|Tenpyō Shōhō]] ([[:en:749|749 AD]]) – {{ill|Kose Neta Maro|de|Kose Neta Maro|ja|巨勢奈弖麻呂|lt=Neta Maro|lt_ja=奈弖麻呂|lt_de=Neta Maro|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Neta Maro|qq=|1=Kose no Natemaro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479771}} was conferred the Ranks of {{ill|Junior Second Rank|de|Junior Second Rank|ja|従二位|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Second Rank|qq=}} and [[:en:Dainagon|Dainagon]]. * In Year 1 of [[:en:Kōnin (era)|Kōnin]] ([[:en:810|810 AD]]) – {{ill|Kose Noashi|de|Kose Noashi|ja|巨勢野足|lt=Noashi|lt_ja=野足|lt_de=Noashi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Noashi|qq=|1=Kose no Notari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479784}} was reappointed as {{ill|Kurando-tō|de|Kurando-tō|ja|蔵人頭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurando-tō|qq=|1=Kurōdonotō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11621873}}. * {{ill|Kose Chūzen|de|Kose Chūzen|ja|巨勢忠善|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Chūzen|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} served the [[:en:Kishū Tokugawa family|Kishu Tokugawa Family]], and when [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshimune|Tokugawa Yoshimune]] became shogun, they became [[:en:Hatamoto|Hatamoto]]. Subsequently, {{ill|Kose Shishin|de|Kose Shishin|ja|巨勢至信|lt=Shishin|lt_ja=至信|lt_de=Shishin|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Shishin|qq=|1=Kose Yukinobu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q24873474}} and {{ill|Kose Shichū|de|Kose Shichū|ja|巨勢至忠|lt=Shichū|lt_ja=至忠|lt_de=Shichū|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Shichū|qq=|1=Kose Yukitada|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q24873642}} (and so on) followed. == Genealogy == {{familytree/start|style=font-size:80%}} {{familytree |border=0| 001 |001=[[:en:Takenouchi no Sukune|Takenouchi no Sukune]]}} {{familytree |border=0| |!|}} {{familytree |border=0| 001 |001='''Kose'''{{ill|Kose Komagari Sukune|de|Kose Komagari Sukune|ja|許勢小柄宿禰|lt=Komagari Sukune|lt_ja=小柄宿禰|lt_de=Komagari Sukune|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Komagari Sukune|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 許勢小柄|1=Kose-no-Ogara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q18226524}}}} {{familytree {{ill|Kose Hirao|de|Kose Hirao|ja|巨勢比良夫|lt=Hirao|lt_ja=比良夫|lt_de=Hirao|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Hirao|qq=|1=Kose Hirao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q96715944}}
{{ill|Kose Tokuda|de|Kose Tokuda|ja|巨勢徳陀|lt=Tokuda|lt_ja=徳陀|lt_de=Tokuda|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Tokuda|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 巨勢徳多|1=Kose no Tokuta|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479774}}
{{ill|Kose Hito|de|Kose Hito|ja|巨勢人|lt=Hito|lt_ja=人|lt_de=Hito|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Hito|qq=|1=Kose no Hito|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479766}}
{{ill|Kose Neta Maro|de|Kose Neta Maro|ja|巨勢奈弖麻呂|lt=Neta Maro|lt_ja=奈弖麻呂|lt_de=Neta Maro|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Neta Maro|qq=|1=Kose no Natemaro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479771}}
{{ill|Kose Noashi|de|Kose Noashi|ja|巨勢野足|lt=Noashi|lt_ja=野足|lt_de=Noashi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Noashi|qq=|1=Kose no Notari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479784}}
[[:en:Kose Kanaoka|Kanaoka]]
{{ill|Jōen-in|de|Jōen-in|ja|浄円院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōen-in|qq=|1=Jōen-in|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6992748}} ? |後裔 = [[:en:Kishū Tokugawa family|Kishu Tokugawa Family]] subordinate [[:en:Hatamoto|Hatamoto]] 2 houses ([[:en:Buke|Buke]]) }} '''Kose Clan''' (巨勢氏) is a [[:en:Clan|clan]] that adopts “Kose” as its clan name. It was an [[:en:Ancient history|Ancient]] [[:en:Gōzoku|Powerful Clan]] based in [[:en:Yamato Province|Yamato Province]][[:en:Takaichi District, Nara|Takaichi District]]Kose District (巨勢郷) (present‐day [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]][[:en:Gose, Nara|Gose City]] Furuse (古瀬)){{Sfn|太田|1934|p=2310}}. The orthography of “Kose” is attested as '''Kose''' (許勢), , '''Kose''' (居勢), and {{Sfn|太田|1934|p=2310}}. The [[:en:Kabane|Surname]] was originally read as {{reading|[[:en:Omi (title)|Omi]]|o‑mi}}, and in the 13th year of [[:en:Emperor Tenmu|Emperor Tenmu]] ([[:en:684|684 AD]]), with the establishment of the {{ill|Eight Family Names|de|Acht Familiennamen|ja|八色の姓|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Family Names|qq=|1=eight kabane system|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11391729}}, it was changed to the surname [[:en:Ason|Asomi]]{{Sfn|太田|1934|p=2311}}. == Overview == According to traditions such as the [[:en:Kiki|Kiki]], the clan is said to descend from [[:en:Emperor Kōgen|Emperor Kogen]], with its founder being {{ill|Kose Komagari Sukune|de|Kose Komagari Sukune|ja|許勢小柄宿禰|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Komagari Sukune|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 許勢小柄|1=Kose-no-Ogara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q18226524}}, the second son of [[:en:Takenouchi no Sukune|Takenouchi no Sukune]]{{Sfn|太田|1934|p=2310}}. After the 6th Century [[:en:6th century|6th Century]], the clan emerged as a rising new power through its diplomatic and military engagements with the {{ill|Korean Peninsula|de|Koreanische Halbinsel|ja|朝鮮半島|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Korean Peninsula|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Korean Peninsula|WD=Q483134}}. Beginning with {{ill|Kose Otoko|de|Kose Otoko|ja|巨勢男人|lt=Man|lt_ja=男人|lt_de=Man|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Otoko|qq=|1=Kose Otoko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479782}}, who became a {{ill|Minister (Ancient Japan)|de|Minister (Altes Japan)|ja|大臣 (古代日本)|lt=Minister|lt_ja=大臣|lt_de=Minister|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minister (Ancient Japan)|qq=|1=Ōomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4328809}} in the reign of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]], followed by {{ill|Kose Inamochi|de|Kose Inamochi|ja|許勢稲持|lt=Inamochi|lt_ja=稲持|lt_de=Inamochi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Inamochi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 巨勢稲持|1=Kose Inamochi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q90866601}} in the reign of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Emperor Kinmei]], {{ill|Kose Saru|de|Kose Saru|ja|巨勢猿|lt=Saru|lt_ja=猿|lt_de=Saru|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Saru|qq=|1=Kose no Saru|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q66480252}} and {{ill|Kose Hirao|de|Kose Hirao|ja|巨勢比良夫|lt=Hirao|lt_ja=比良夫|lt_de=Hirao|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Hirao|qq=|1=Kose Hirao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q96715944}} in the reign of [[:en:Emperor Sushun|Emperor Sushun]], and {{ill|Kose Daimaro|de|Kose Daimaro|ja|許勢大摩呂|lt=Daimaro|lt_ja=大摩呂|lt_de=Daimaro|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Daimaro|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in the reign of [[:en:Empress Suiko|Empress Suiko]], members of the clan appear as officials of the [[:en:Taifu|Daihu]] (councilor) class{{Sfn|太田|1934|p=2311}}, though their genealogical relationships remain unclear. In the [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka Period]], during the reign of [[:en:Emperor Kōtoku|Emperor Kōtoku]], {{ill|Kose Tokuda|de|Kose Tokuda|ja|巨勢徳陀|lt=Tokuda|lt_ja=徳陀|lt_de=Tokuda|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Tokuda|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 巨勢徳多|1=Kose no Tokuta|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479774}} served as [[:en:Minister of the Left|Minister of the Left]], and in the reign of [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]], {{ill|Kose Hito|de|Kose Hito|ja|巨勢人|lt=Hito|lt_ja=人|lt_de=Hito|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Hito|qq=|1=Kose no Hito|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479766}} served as {{ill|Censorial Official|de|Zensor|ja|御史大夫|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Censorial Official|qq=|1=yushi dafu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11071155}}; moreover, in the [[:en:Nara period|Nara Period]], {{ill|Kose Maro|de|Kose Maro|ja|巨勢麻呂|lt=Maro|lt_ja=麻呂|lt_de=Maro|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Maro|qq=|1=Kose no Maro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479786}} and {{ill|Kose Eji|de|Kose Eji|ja|巨勢邑治|lt=Eji|lt_ja=邑治|lt_de=Eji|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Eji|qq=|1=Kose Eji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479785}} held the position of [[:en:Chūnagon|Chunagon]], while {{ill|Kose Neta Maro|de|Kose Neta Maro|ja|巨勢奈弖麻呂|lt=Neta Maro|lt_ja=奈弖麻呂|lt_de=Neta Maro|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Neta Maro|qq=|1=Kose no Natemaro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479771}} was promoted to [[:en:Dainagon|Dainagon]]{{Sfn|太田|1934|p=2311}}. In the early [[:en:Heian period|Heian Period]], after producing {{ill|Kose Noashi|de|Kose Noashi|ja|巨勢野足|lt=Noashi|lt_ja=野足|lt_de=Noashi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Noashi|qq=|1=Kose no Notari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479784}}, who was first appointed as {{ill|Kurando-tō|de|Kurando-tō|ja|蔵人頭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurando-tō|qq=|1=Kurōdonotō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11621873}} and later promoted to [[:en:Chūnagon|Chunagon]], no other member rose to the level of court nobility. [[:en:Kose Kanaoka|Kanaoka]], the founder of the {{ill|Kose School|de|Kose Schule|ja|巨勢派|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose School|qq=|1=Kose school|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479780}}, was a great‑grandson of Noashi. == Developments == * Early 6th Century – In the reign of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]], {{ill|Kose Otoko|de|Kose Otoko|ja|巨勢男人|lt=Man|lt_ja=男人|lt_de=Man|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Otoko|qq=|1=Kose Otoko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479782}} became a [[:en:Minister (government)|Minister]], and his daughters {{ill|Sadehime|de|Sadehime|ja|紗手媛|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadehime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|Kakayuhime|de|Kakayuhime|ja|香々有媛|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakayuhime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} were married to [[:en:Emperor Ankan|Emperor Ankan]]. * In Year 2 of [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]] ([[:en:587|587 AD]]) – {{ill|Kose Hirao|de|Kose Hirao|ja|巨勢比良夫|lt=Hirao|lt_ja=比良夫|lt_de=Hirao|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Hirao|qq=|1=Kose Hirao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q96715944}} participated in the [[:en:Soga–Mononobe conflict|Teimei Rebellion]] and annihilated [[:en:Mononobe no Moriya|Mononobe Moriya]]. * In Year 5 of the [[:en:Taika (era)|Taika Era]] ([[:en:649|649 AD]]) – {{ill|Kose Tokuda|de|Kose Tokuda|ja|巨勢徳陀|lt=Tokuda|lt_ja=徳陀|lt_de=Tokuda|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Tokuda|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 巨勢徳多|1=Kose no Tokuta|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479774}} became [[:en:Minister of the Left|Minister of the Left]]. * In Year 1 of [[:en:Emperor Tenmu|Emperor Tenmu]] ([[:en:672|672 AD]]) – {{ill|Kose Hito|de|Kose Hito|ja|巨勢人|lt=Hito|lt_ja=人|lt_de=Hito|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Hito|qq=|1=Kose no Hito|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479766}} sided with the Omi faction in the [[:en:Jinshin War|Jinshin War]] and was sentenced to [[:en:Exile|Exile]]. * In Year 13 of Emperor Tenmu ([[:en:684|684 AD]]) – {{ill|Kose Kuromaro|de|Kose Kuromaro|ja|巨勢黒麻呂|lt=Kuromaro|lt_ja=黒麻呂|lt_de=Kuromaro|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Kuromaro|qq=|1=Kose no Kurohito|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q109287613}} and {{ill|Kose Shitan|de|Kose Shitan|ja|巨勢紫檀|lt=Shitan|lt_ja=紫檀|lt_de=Shitan|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Shitan|qq=|1=Kose Shitan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30932551}} were granted the surname [[:en:Ason|Asomi]]. * In Year 1 of [[:en:Tenpyō-shōhō|Tenpyō Shōhō]] ([[:en:749|749 AD]]) – {{ill|Kose Neta Maro|de|Kose Neta Maro|ja|巨勢奈弖麻呂|lt=Neta Maro|lt_ja=奈弖麻呂|lt_de=Neta Maro|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Neta Maro|qq=|1=Kose no Natemaro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479771}} was conferred the Ranks of {{ill|Junior Second Rank|de|Junior Second Rank|ja|従二位|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Second Rank|qq=}} and [[:en:Dainagon|Dainagon]]. * In Year 1 of [[:en:Kōnin {{ill|Kose Hirao|de|Kose Hirao|ja|巨勢比良夫|lt=Hirao|lt_ja=比良夫|lt_de=Hirao|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Hirao|1=Kose Hirao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q96715944}}

{{ill|Kose Noashi|de|Kose Noashi|ja|巨勢野足|lt=Noashi|lt_ja=野足|lt_de=Noashi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Noashi|1=Kose no Notari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479784}}
[[:en:Kose Kanaoka|Kanaoka]]
{{ill|Jōen-in|de|Jōen-in|ja|浄円院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōen-in|1=Jōen-in|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6992748}} ? |後裔 = [[:en:Kishū Tokugawa family|Kishu Tokugawa Family]] subordinate [[:en:Hatamoto|Hatamoto]] 2 houses ([[:en:Buke|Buke]]) }} '''Kose Clan''' (巨勢氏) is a [[:en:Clan|clan]] that adopts “Kose” as its clan name. It was an [[:en:Ancient history|Ancient]] [[:en:Gōzoku|Powerful Clan]] based in [[:en:Yamato Province|Yamato Province]][[:en:Takaichi District, Nara|Takaichi District]]Kose District (巨勢郷) (present‐day [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]][[:en:Gose, Nara|Gose City]] Furuse (古瀬)){{Sfn|太田|1934|p=2310}}. The orthography of “Kose” is attested as '''Kose''' (許勢), , '''Kose''' (居勢), and {{Sfn|太田|1934|p=2310}}. The [[:en:Kabane|Surname]] was originally read as {{reading|[[:en:Omi (title)|Omi]]|o‑mi}}, and in the 13th year of [[:en:Emperor Tenmu|Emperor Tenmu]] ([[:en:684|684 AD]]), with the establishment of the {{ill|Eight Family Names|de|Acht Familiennamen|ja|八色の姓|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Family Names|1=eight kabane system|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11391729}}, it was changed to the surname [[:en:Ason|Asomi]]{{Sfn|太田|1934|p=2311}}. == Overview == According to traditions such as the [[:en:Kiki|Kiki]], the clan is said to descend from [[:en:Emperor Kōgen|Emperor Kogen]], with its founder being {{ill|Kose Komagari Sukune|de|Kose Komagari Sukune|ja|許勢小柄宿禰|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Komagari Sukune|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 許勢小柄|1=Kose-no-Ogara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q18226524}}, the second son of [[:en:Takenouchi no Sukune|Takenouchi no Sukune]]{{Sfn|太田|1934|p=2310}}. After the 6th Century [[:en:6th century|6th Century]], the clan emerged as a rising new power through its diplomatic and military engagements with the {{ill|Korean Peninsula|de|Koreanische Halbinsel|ja|朝鮮半島|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Korean Peninsula|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Korean Peninsula|WD=Q483134}}. Beginning with {{ill|Kose Otoko|de|Kose Otoko|ja|巨勢男人|lt=Man|lt_ja=男人|lt_de=Man|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Otoko|1=Kose Otoko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479782}}, who became a {{ill|Minister (Ancient Japan)|de|Minister (Altes Japan)|ja|大臣 (古代日本)|lt=Minister|lt_ja=大臣|lt_de=Minister|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minister (Ancient Japan)|1=Ōomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4328809}} in the reign of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]], followed by {{ill|Kose Inamochi|de|Kose Inamochi|ja|許勢稲持|lt=Inamochi|lt_ja=稲持|lt_de=Inamochi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Inamochi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 巨勢稲持|1=Kose Inamochi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q90866601}} in the reign of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Emperor Kinmei]], {{ill|Kose Saru|de|Kose Saru|ja|巨勢猿|lt=Saru|lt_ja=猿|lt_de=Saru|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Saru|1=Kose no Saru|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q66480252}} and {{ill|Kose Hirao|de|Kose Hirao|ja|巨勢比良夫|lt=Hirao|lt_ja=比良夫|lt_de=Hirao|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Hirao|1=Kose Hirao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q96715944}} in the reign of [[:en:Emperor Sushun|Emperor Sushun]], and {{ill|Kose Daimaro|de|Kose Daimaro|ja|許勢大摩呂|lt=Daimaro|lt_ja=大摩呂|lt_de=Daimaro|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Daimaro|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in the reign of [[:en:Empress Suiko|Empress Suiko]], members of the clan appear as officials of the [[:en:Taifu|Daihu]] (councilor) class{{Sfn|太田|1934|p=2311}}, though their genealogical relationships remain unclear. In the [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka Period]], during the reign of [[:en:Emperor Kōtoku|Emperor Kōtoku]], {{ill|Kose Tokuda|de|Kose Tokuda|ja|巨勢徳陀|lt=Tokuda|lt_ja=徳陀|lt_de=Tokuda|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Tokuda|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 巨勢徳多|1=Kose no Tokuta|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479774}} served as [[:en:Minister of the Left|Minister of the Left]], and in the reign of [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]], {{ill|Kose Hito|de|Kose Hito|ja|巨勢人|lt=Hito|lt_ja=人|lt_de=Hito|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Hito|1=Kose no Hito|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479766}} served as {{ill|Censorial Official|de|Zensor|ja|御史大夫|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Censorial Official|1=yushi dafu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11071155}}; moreover, in the [[:en:Nara period|Nara Period]], {{ill|Kose Maro|de|Kose Maro|ja|巨勢麻呂|lt=Maro|lt_ja=麻呂|lt_de=Maro|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Maro|1=Kose no Maro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479786}} and {{ill|Kose Eji|de|Kose Eji|ja|巨勢邑治|lt=Eji|lt_ja=邑治|lt_de=Eji|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Eji|1=Kose Eji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479785}} held the position of [[:en:Chūnagon|Chunagon]], while {{ill|Kose Neta Maro|de|Kose Neta Maro|ja|巨勢奈弖麻呂|lt=Neta Maro|lt_ja=奈弖麻呂|lt_de=Neta Maro|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Neta Maro|1=Kose no Natemaro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479771}} was promoted to [[:en:Dainagon|Dainagon]]{{Sfn|太田|1934|p=2311}}. In the early [[:en:Heian period|Heian Period]], after producing {{ill|Kose Noashi|de|Kose Noashi|ja|巨勢野足|lt=Noashi|lt_ja=野足|lt_de=Noashi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Noashi|1=Kose no Notari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479784}}, who was first appointed as {{ill|Kurando-tō|de|Kurando-tō|ja|蔵人頭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurando-tō|1=Kurōdonotō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11621873}} and later promoted to [[:en:Chūnagon|Chunagon]], no other member rose to the level of court nobility. [[:en:Kose Kanaoka|Kanaoka]], the founder of the {{ill|Kose School|de|Kose Schule|ja|巨勢派|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose School|1=Kose school|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479780}}, was a great‑grandson of Noashi. == Developments == * Early 6th Century – In the reign of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]], {{ill|Kose Otoko|de|Kose Otoko|ja|巨勢男人|lt=Man|lt_ja=男人|lt_de=Man|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Otoko|1=Kose Otoko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479782}} became a [[:en:Minister (government)|Minister]], and his daughters {{ill|Sadehime|de|Sadehime|ja|紗手媛|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadehime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|Kakayuhime|de|Kakayuhime|ja|香々有媛|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakayuhime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} were married to [[:en:Emperor Ankan|Emperor Ankan]]. * In Year 2 of [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]] ([[:en:587|587 AD]]) – {{ill|Kose Hirao|de|Kose Hirao|ja|巨勢比良夫|lt=Hirao|lt_ja=比良夫|lt_de=Hirao|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Hirao|1=Kose Hirao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q96715944}} participated in the [[:en:Soga–Mononobe conflict|Teimei Rebellion]] and annihilated [[:en:Mononobe no Moriya|Mononobe Moriya]]. * In Year 5 of the [[:en:Taika (era)|Taika Era]] ([[:en:649|649 AD]]) – {{ill|Kose Tokuda|de|Kose Tokuda|ja|巨勢徳陀|lt=Tokuda|lt_ja=徳陀|lt_de=Tokuda|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Tokuda|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 巨勢徳多|1=Kose no Tokuta|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479774}} became [[:en:Minister of the Left|Minister of the Left]]. * In Year 1 of [[:en:Emperor Tenmu|Emperor Tenmu]] ([[:en:672|672 AD]]) – {{ill|Kose Hito|de|Kose Hito|ja|巨勢人|lt=Hito|lt_ja=人|lt_de=Hito|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Hito|1=Kose no Hito|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479766}} sided with the Omi faction in the [[:en:Jinshin War|Jinshin War]] and was sentenced to [[:en:Exile|Exile]]. * In Year 13 of Emperor Tenmu ([[:en:684|684 AD]]) – {{ill|Kose Kuromaro|de|Kose Kuromaro|ja|巨勢黒麻呂|lt=Kuromaro|lt_ja=黒麻呂|lt_de=Kuromaro|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Kuromaro|1=Kose no Kurohito|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q109287613}} and {{ill|Kose Shitan|de|Kose Shitan|ja|巨勢紫檀|lt=Shitan|lt_ja=紫檀|lt_de=Shitan|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Shitan|1=Kose Shitan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30932551}} were granted the surname [[:en:Ason|Asomi]]. * In Year 1 of [[:en:Tenpyō-shōhō|Tenpyō Shōhō]] ([[:en:749|749 AD]]) – {{ill|Kose Neta Maro|de|Kose Neta Maro|ja|巨勢奈弖麻呂|lt=Neta Maro|lt_ja=奈弖麻呂|lt_de=Neta Maro|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Neta Maro|1=Kose no Natemaro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479771}} was conferred the Ranks of {{ill|Junior Second Rank|de|Junior Second Rank|ja|従二位|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Second Rank|qq=}} and [[:en:Dainagon|Dainagon]]. * In Year 1 of [[:en:Kōnin (era)|Kōnin]] ([[:en:810|810 AD]]) – {{ill|Kose Noashi|de|Kose Noashi|ja|巨勢野足|lt=Noashi|lt_ja=野足|lt_de=Noashi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Noashi|1=Kose no Notari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479784}} was reappointed as {{ill|Kurando-tō|de|Kurando-tō|ja|蔵人頭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurando-tō|1=Kurōdonotō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11621873}}. * {{ill|Kose Chūzen|de|Kose Chūzen|ja|巨勢忠善|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Chūzen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} served the [[:en:Kishū Tokugawa family|Kishu Tokugawa Family]], and when [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshimune|Tokugawa Yoshimune]] became shogun, they became [[:en:Hatamoto|Hatamoto]]. Subsequently, {{ill|Kose Shishin|de|Kose Shishin|ja|巨勢至信|lt=Shishin|lt_ja=至信|lt_de=Shishin|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Shishin|1=Kose Yukinobu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q24873474}} and {{ill|Kose Shichū|de|Kose Shichū|ja|巨勢至忠|lt=Shichū|lt_ja=至忠|lt_de=Shichū|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Shichū|1=Kose Yukitada|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q24873642}} (and so on) followed. == Genealogy == {{familytree/start|style=font-size:80%}} {{familytree |border=0| 001 |001=[[:en:Takenouchi no Sukune|Takenouchi no Sukune]]}} {{familytree {{ill|Kose Noashi|de|Kose Noashi|ja|巨勢野足|lt=Noashi|lt_ja=野足|lt_de=Noashi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Noashi|1=Kose no Notari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479784}}
[[:en:Kose Kanaoka|Kanaoka]]
{{ill|Jōen-in|de|Jōen-in|ja|浄円院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōen-in|1=Jōen-in|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6992748}} ? |後裔 = [[:en:Kishū Tokugawa family|Kishu Tokugawa Family]] subordinate [[:en:Hatamoto|Hatamoto]] 2 houses ([[:en:Buke|Buke]]) }} '''Kose Clan''' (巨勢氏) is a [[:en:Clan|clan]] that adopts “Kose” as its clan name. It was an [[:en:Ancient history|Ancient]] [[:en:Gōzoku|Powerful Clan]] based in [[:en:Yamato Province|Yamato Province]][[:en:Takaichi District, Nara|Takaichi District]]Kose District (巨勢郷) (present‐day [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]][[:en:Gose, Nara|Gose City]] Furuse (古瀬)){{Sfn|太田|1934|p=2310}}. The orthography of “Kose” is attested as '''Kose''' (許勢), , '''Kose''' (居勢), and {{Sfn|太田|1934|p=2310}}. The [[:en:Kabane|Surname]] was originally read as {{reading|[[:en:Omi (title)|Omi]]|o‑mi}}, and in the 13th year of [[:en:Emperor Tenmu|Emperor Tenmu]] ([[:en:684|684 AD]]), with the establishment of the {{ill|Eight Family Names|de|Acht Familiennamen|ja|八色の姓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Family Names|1=eight kabane system|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11391729}}, it was changed to the surname [[:en:Ason|Asomi]]{{Sfn|太田|1934|p=2311}}. == Overview == According to traditions such as the [[:en:Kiki|Kiki]], the clan is said to descend from [[:en:Emperor Kōgen|Emperor Kogen]], with its founder being {{ill|Kose Komagari Sukune|de|Kose Komagari Sukune|ja|許勢小柄宿禰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Komagari Sukune|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 許勢小柄|1=Kose-no-Ogara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q18226524}}, the second son of [[:en:Takenouchi no Sukune|Takenouchi no Sukune]]{{Sfn|太田|1934|p=2310}}. After the 6th Century [[:en:6th century|6th Century]], the clan emerged as a rising new power through its diplomatic and military engagements with the {{ill|Korean Peninsula|de|Koreanische Halbinsel|ja|朝鮮半島|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Korean Peninsula|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Korean Peninsula|WD=Q483134}}. Beginning with {{ill|Kose Otoko|de|Kose Otoko|ja|巨勢男人|lt=Man|lt_ja=男人|lt_de=Man|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Otoko|1=Kose Otoko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479782}}, who became a {{ill|Minister (Ancient Japan)|de|Minister (Altes Japan)|ja|大臣 (古代日本)|lt=Minister|lt_ja=大臣|lt_de=Minister|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minister (Ancient Japan)|1=Ōomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4328809}} in the reign of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]], followed by {{ill|Kose Inamochi|de|Kose Inamochi|ja|許勢稲持|lt=Inamochi|lt_ja=稲持|lt_de=Inamochi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Inamochi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 巨勢稲持|1=Kose Inamochi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q90866601}} in the reign of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Emperor Kinmei]], {{ill|Kose Saru|de|Kose Saru|ja|巨勢猿|lt=Saru|lt_ja=猿|lt_de=Saru|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Saru|1=Kose no Saru|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q66480252}} and {{ill|Kose Hirao|de|Kose Hirao|ja|巨勢比良夫|lt=Hirao|lt_ja=比良夫|lt_de=Hirao|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Hirao|1=Kose Hirao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q96715944}} in the reign of [[:en:Emperor Sushun|Emperor Sushun]], and {{ill|Kose Daimaro|de|Kose Daimaro|ja|許勢大摩呂|lt=Daimaro|lt_ja=大摩呂|lt_de=Daimaro|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Daimaro|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in the reign of [[:en:Empress Suiko|Empress Suiko]], members of the clan appear as officials of the [[:en:Taifu|Daihu]] (councilor) class{{Sfn|太田|1934|p=2311}}, though their genealogical relationships remain unclear. In the [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka Period]], during the reign of [[:en:Emperor Kōtoku|Emperor Kōtoku]], {{ill|Kose Tokuda|de|Kose Tokuda|ja|巨勢徳陀|lt=Tokuda|lt_ja=徳陀|lt_de=Tokuda|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Tokuda|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 巨勢徳多|1=Kose no Tokuta|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479774}} served as [[:en:Minister of the Left|Minister of the Left]], and in the reign of [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]], {{ill|Kose Hito|de|Kose Hito|ja|巨勢人|lt=Hito|lt_ja=人|lt_de=Hito|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Hito|1=Kose no Hito|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479766}} served as {{ill|Censorial Official|de|Zensor|ja|御史大夫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Censorial Official|1=yushi dafu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11071155}}; moreover, in the [[:en:Nara period|Nara Period]], {{ill|Kose Maro|de|Kose Maro|ja|巨勢麻呂|lt=Maro|lt_ja=麻呂|lt_de=Maro|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Maro|1=Kose no Maro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479786}} and {{ill|Kose Eji|de|Kose Eji|ja|巨勢邑治|lt=Eji|lt_ja=邑治|lt_de=Eji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Eji|1=Kose Eji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479785}} held the position of [[:en:Chūnagon|Chunagon]], while {{ill|Kose Neta Maro|de|Kose Neta Maro|ja|巨勢奈弖麻呂|lt=Neta Maro|lt_ja=奈弖麻呂|lt_de=Neta Maro|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Neta Maro|1=Kose no Natemaro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479771}} was promoted to [[:en:Dainagon|Dainagon]]{{Sfn|太田|1934|p=2311}}. In the early [[:en:Heian period|Heian Period]], after producing {{ill|Kose Noashi|de|Kose Noashi|ja|巨勢野足|lt=Noashi|lt_ja=野足|lt_de=Noashi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Noashi|1=Kose no Notari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479784}}, who was first appointed as {{ill|Kurando-tō|de|Kurando-tō|ja|蔵人頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurando-tō|1=Kurōdonotō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11621873}} and later promoted to [[:en:Chūnagon|Chunagon]], no other member rose to the level of court nobility. [[:en:Kose Kanaoka|Kanaoka]], the founder of the {{ill|Kose School|de|Kose Schule|ja|巨勢派|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose School|1=Kose school|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479780}}, was a great‑grandson of Noashi. == Developments == * Early 6th Century – In the reign of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]], {{ill|Kose Otoko|de|Kose Otoko|ja|巨勢男人|lt=Man|lt_ja=男人|lt_de=Man|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Otoko|1=Kose Otoko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479782}} became a [[:en:Minister (government)|Minister]], and his daughters {{ill|Sadehime|de|Sadehime|ja|紗手媛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadehime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|Kakayuhime|de|Kakayuhime|ja|香々有媛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakayuhime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} were married to [[:en:Emperor Ankan|Emperor Ankan]]. * In Year 2 of [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]] ([[:en:587|587 AD]]) – {{ill|Kose Hirao|de|Kose Hirao|ja|巨勢比良夫|lt=Hirao|lt_ja=比良夫|lt_de=Hirao|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Hirao|1=Kose Hirao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q96715944}} participated in the [[:en:Soga–Mononobe conflict|Teimei Rebellion]] and annihilated [[:en:Mononobe no Moriya|Mononobe Moriya]]. * In Year 5 of the [[:en:Taika (era)|Taika Era]] ([[:en:649|649 AD]]) – {{ill|Kose Tokuda|de|Kose Tokuda|ja|巨勢徳陀|lt=Tokuda|lt_ja=徳陀|lt_de=Tokuda|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Tokuda|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 巨勢徳多|1=Kose no Tokuta|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479774}} became [[:en:Minister of the Left|Minister of the Left]]. * In Year 1 of [[:en:Emperor Tenmu|Emperor Tenmu]] ([[:en:672|672 AD]]) – {{ill|Kose Hito|de|Kose Hito|ja|巨勢人|lt=Hito|lt_ja=人|lt_de=Hito|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Hito|1=Kose no Hito|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479766}} sided with the Omi faction in the [[:en:Jinshin War|Jinshin War]] and was sentenced to [[:en:Exile|Exile]]. * In Year 13 of Emperor Tenmu ([[:en:684|684 AD]]) – {{ill|Kose Kuromaro|de|Kose Kuromaro|ja|巨勢黒麻呂|lt=Kuromaro|lt_ja=黒麻呂|lt_de=Kuromaro|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Kuromaro|1=Kose no Kurohito|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q109287613}} and {{ill|Kose Shitan|de|Kose Shitan|ja|巨勢紫檀|lt=Shitan|lt_ja=紫檀|lt_de=Shitan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Shitan|1=Kose Shitan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30932551}} were granted the surname [[:en:Ason|Asomi]]. * In Year 1 of [[:en:Tenpyō-shōhō|Tenpyō Shōhō]] ([[:en:749|749 AD]]) – {{ill|Kose Neta Maro|de|Kose Neta Maro|ja|巨勢奈弖麻呂|lt=Neta Maro|lt_ja=奈弖麻呂|lt_de=Neta Maro|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Neta Maro|1=Kose no Natemaro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479771}} was conferred the Ranks of {{ill|Junior Second Rank|de|Junior Second Rank|ja|従二位|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Second Rank|qq=}} and [[:en:Dainagon|Dainagon]]. * In Year 1 of [[:en:Kōnin (era)|Kōnin]] ([[:en:810|810 AD]]) – {{ill|Kose Noashi|de|Kose Noashi|ja|巨勢野足|lt=Noashi|lt_ja=野足|lt_de=Noashi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Noashi|1=Kose no Notari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479784}} was reappointed as {{ill|Kurando-tō|de|Kurando-tō|ja|蔵人頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurando-tō|1=Kurōdonotō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11621873}}. * {{ill|Kose Chūzen|de|Kose Chūzen|ja|巨勢忠善|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Chūzen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} served the [[:en:Kishū Tokugawa family|Kishu Tokugawa Family]], and when [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshimune|Tokugawa Yoshimune]] became shogun, they became [[:en:Hatamoto|Hatamoto]]. Subsequently, {{ill|Kose Shishin|de|Kose Shishin|ja|巨勢至信|lt=Shishin|lt_ja=至信|lt_de=Shishin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Shishin|1=Kose Yukinobu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q24873474}} and {{ill|Kose Shichū|de|Kose Shichū|ja|巨勢至忠|lt=Shichū|lt_ja=至忠|lt_de=Shichū|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Shichū|1=Kose Yukitada|comment=changed title based on revision.text:
[[ja:巨勢氏]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11479778]] Wikidata name: Kose clan [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:39, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11479778]] Wikidata name: Kose clan [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:18, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} ]] ) --> {{translated page|ja|巨勢氏|version=90698167|comment=Imported full ja history}} |始祖 = |出自 = |氏祖 = {{ill|Kose Komagari Sukune|de|Kose Komagari Sukune|ja|許勢小柄宿禰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Komagari Sukune|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 許勢小柄|1=Kose-no-Ogara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q18226524}}{{Sfn|太田|1934|p=2310}} |種別 = {{ill|Imperial Branch|de|Imperial Branch|ja|皇別|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Branch|1=Kōbetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11581000}} |本貫 = [[:en:Yamato Province|Yamato Province]][[:en:Takaichi District, Nara|Takaichi District]]Kose District (巨勢郷){{Sfn|太田|1934|p=2310}} |人物 = {{ill|Kose Otoko|de|Kose Otoko|ja|巨勢男人|lt=Man|lt_ja=男人|lt_de=Man|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Otoko|1=Kose Otoko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479782}}
{{ill|Kose Hirao|de|Kose Hirao|ja|巨勢比良夫|lt=Hirao|lt_ja=比良夫|lt_de=Hirao|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Hirao|1=Kose Hirao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q96715944}}
{{ill|Kose Tokuda|de|Kose Tokuda|ja|巨勢徳陀|lt=Tokuda|lt_ja=徳陀|lt_de=Tokuda|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Tokuda|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 巨勢徳多|1=Kose no Tokuta|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479774}}
{{ill|Kose Hito|de|Kose Hito|ja|巨勢人|lt=Hito|lt_ja=人|lt_de=Hito|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Hito|1=Kose no Hito|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479766}}
{{ill|Kose Neta Maro|de|Kose Neta Maro|ja|巨勢奈弖麻呂|lt=Neta Maro|lt_ja=奈弖麻呂|lt_de=Neta Maro|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Neta Maro|1=Kose no Natemaro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479771}}
{{ill|Kose Noashi|de|Kose Noashi|ja|巨勢野足|lt=Noashi|lt_ja=野足|lt_de=Noashi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Noashi|1=Kose no Notari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479784}}
[[:en:Kose Kanaoka|Kanaoka]]
{{ill|Jōen-in|de|Jōen-in|ja|浄円院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōen-in|1=Jōen-in|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6992748}} ? |後裔 = [[:en:Kishū Tokugawa family|Kishu Tokugawa Family]] subordinate [[:en:Hatamoto|Hatamoto]] 2 houses ([[:en:Buke|Buke]]) }} '''Kose Clan''' (巨勢氏) is a [[:en:Clan|clan]] that adopts “Kose” as its clan name. It was an [[:en:Ancient history|Ancient]] [[:en:Gōzoku|Powerful Clan]] based in [[:en:Yamato Province|Yamato Province]][[:en:Takaichi District, Nara|Takaichi District]]Kose District (巨勢郷) (present‐day [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]][[:en:Gose, Nara|Gose City]] Furuse (古瀬)){{Sfn|太田|1934|p=2310}}. The orthography of “Kose” is attested as '''Kose''' (許勢), , '''Kose''' (居勢), and {{Sfn|太田|1934|p=2310}}. The [[:en:Kabane|Surname]] was originally read as {{reading|[[:en:Omi (title)|Omi]]|o‑mi}}, and in the 13th year of [[:en:Emperor Tenmu|Emperor Tenmu]] ([[:en:684|684 AD]]), with the establishment of the {{ill|Eight Family Names|de|Acht Familiennamen|ja|八色の姓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Family Names|1=eight kabane system|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11391729}}, it was changed to the surname [[:en:Ason|Asomi]]{{Sfn|太田|1934|p=2311}}. == Overview == According to traditions such as the [[:en:Kiki|Kiki]], the clan is said to descend from [[:en:Emperor Kōgen|Emperor Kogen]], with its founder being {{ill|Kose Komagari Sukune|de|Kose Komagari Sukune|ja|許勢小柄宿禰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Komagari Sukune|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 許勢小柄|1=Kose-no-Ogara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q18226524}}, the second son of [[:en:Takenouchi no Sukune|Takenouchi no Sukune]]{{Sfn|太田|1934|p=2310}}. After the 6th Century [[:en:6th century|6th Century]], the clan emerged as a rising new power through its diplomatic and military engagements with the {{ill|Korean Peninsula|de|Koreanische Halbinsel|ja|朝鮮半島|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Korean Peninsula|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Korean Peninsula|WD=Q483134}}. Beginning with {{ill|Kose Otoko|de|Kose Otoko|ja|巨勢男人|lt=Man|lt_ja=男人|lt_de=Man|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Otoko|1=Kose Otoko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479782}}, who became a {{ill|Minister (Ancient Japan)|de|Minister (Altes Japan)|ja|大臣 (古代日本)|lt=Minister|lt_ja=大臣|lt_de=Minister|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minister (Ancient Japan)|1=Ōomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4328809}} in the reign of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]], followed by {{ill|Kose Inamochi|de|Kose Inamochi|ja|許勢稲持|lt=Inamochi|lt_ja=稲持|lt_de=Inamochi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Inamochi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 巨勢稲持|1=Kose Inamochi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q90866601}} in the reign of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Emperor Kinmei]], {{ill|Kose Saru|de|Kose Saru|ja|巨勢猿|lt=Saru|lt_ja=猿|lt_de=Saru|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Saru|1=Kose no Saru|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q66480252}} and {{ill|Kose Hirao|de|Kose Hirao|ja|巨勢比良夫|lt=Hirao|lt_ja=比良夫|lt_de=Hirao|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Hirao|1=Kose Hirao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q96715944}} in the reign of [[:en:Emperor Sushun|Emperor Sushun]], and {{ill|Kose Daimaro|de|Kose Daimaro|ja|許勢大摩呂|lt=Daimaro|lt_ja=大摩呂|lt_de=Daimaro|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Daimaro|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in the reign of [[:en:Empress Suiko|Empress Suiko]], members of the clan appear as officials of the [[:en:Taifu|Daihu]] (councilor) class{{Sfn|太田|1934|p=2311}}, though their genealogical relationships remain unclear. In the [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka Period]], during the reign of [[:en:Emperor Kōtoku|Emperor Kōtoku]], {{ill|Kose Tokuda|de|Kose Tokuda|ja|巨勢徳陀|lt=Tokuda|lt_ja=徳陀|lt_de=Tokuda|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Tokuda|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 巨勢徳多|1=Kose no Tokuta|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479774}} served as [[:en:Minister of the Left|Minister of the Left]], and in the reign of [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]], {{ill|Kose Hito|de|Kose Hito|ja|巨勢人|lt=Hito|lt_ja=人|lt_de=Hito|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Hito|1=Kose no Hito|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479766}} served as {{ill|Censorial Official|de|Zensor|ja|御史大夫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Censorial Official|1=yushi dafu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11071155}}; moreover, in the [[:en:Nara period|Nara Period]], {{ill|Kose Maro|de|Kose Maro|ja|巨勢麻呂|lt=Maro|lt_ja=麻呂|lt_de=Maro|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Maro|1=Kose no Maro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479786}} and {{ill|Kose Eji|de|Kose Eji|ja|巨勢邑治|lt=Eji|lt_ja=邑治|lt_de=Eji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Eji|1=Kose Eji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479785}} held the position of [[:en:Chūnagon|Chunagon]], while {{ill|Kose Neta Maro|de|Kose Neta Maro|ja|巨勢奈弖麻呂|lt=Neta Maro|lt_ja=奈弖麻呂|lt_de=Neta Maro|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Neta Maro|1=Kose no Natemaro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479771}} was promoted to [[:en:Dainagon|Dainagon]]{{Sfn|太田|1934|p=2311}}. In the early [[:en:Heian period|Heian Period]], after producing {{ill|Kose Noashi|de|Kose Noashi|ja|巨勢野足|lt=Noashi|lt_ja=野足|lt_de=Noashi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Noashi|1=Kose no Notari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479784}}, who was first appointed as {{ill|Kurando-tō|de|Kurando-tō|ja|蔵人頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurando-tō|1=Kurōdonotō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11621873}} and later promoted to [[:en:Chūnagon|Chunagon]], no other member rose to the level of court nobility. [[:en:Kose Kanaoka|Kanaoka]], the founder of the {{ill|Kose School|de|Kose Schule|ja|巨勢派|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose School|1=Kose school|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479780}}, was a great‑grandson of Noashi. == Developments == * Early 6th Century – In the reign of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]], {{ill|Kose Otoko|de|Kose Otoko|ja|巨勢男人|lt=Man|lt_ja=男人|lt_de=Man|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Otoko|1=Kose Otoko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479782}} became a [[:en:Minister (government)|Minister]], and his daughters {{ill|Sadehime|de|Sadehime|ja|紗手媛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadehime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|Kakayuhime|de|Kakayuhime|ja|香々有媛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakayuhime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} were married to [[:en:Emperor Ankan|Emperor Ankan]]. * In Year 2 of [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]] ([[:en:587|587 AD]]) – {{ill|Kose Hirao|de|Kose Hirao|ja|巨勢比良夫|lt=Hirao|lt_ja=比良夫|lt_de=Hirao|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Hirao|1=Kose Hirao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q96715944}} participated in the [[:en:Soga–Mononobe conflict|Teimei Rebellion]] and annihilated [[:en:Mononobe no Moriya|Mononobe Moriya]]. * In Year 5 of the [[:en:Taika (era)|Taika Era]] ([[:en:649|649 AD]]) – {{ill|Kose Tokuda|de|Kose Tokuda|ja|巨勢徳陀|lt=Tokuda|lt_ja=徳陀|lt_de=Tokuda|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Tokuda|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 巨勢徳多|1=Kose no Tokuta|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479774}} became [[:en:Minister of the Left|Minister of the Left]]. * In Year 1 of [[:en:Emperor Tenmu|Emperor Tenmu]] ([[:en:672|672 AD]]) – {{ill|Kose Hito|de|Kose Hito|ja|巨勢人|lt=Hito|lt_ja=人|lt_de=Hito|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Hito|1=Kose no Hito|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479766}} sided with the Omi faction in the [[:en:Jinshin War|Jinshin War]] and was sentenced to [[:en:Exile|Exile]]. * In Year 13 of Emperor Tenmu ([[:en:684|684 AD]]) – {{ill|Kose Kuromaro|de|Kose Kuromaro|ja|巨勢黒麻呂|lt=Kuromaro|lt_ja=黒麻呂|lt_de=Kuromaro|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Kuromaro|1=Kose no Kuromaro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q109287613}} and {{ill|Kose Shitan|de|Kose Shitan|ja|巨勢紫檀|lt=Shitan|lt_ja=紫檀|lt_de=Shitan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Shitan|1=Kose Shitan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30932551}} were granted the surname [[:en:Ason|Asomi]]. * In Year 1 of [[:en:Tenpyō-shōhō|Tenpyō Shōhō]] ([[:en:749|749 AD]]) – {{ill|Kose Neta Maro|de|Kose Neta Maro|ja|巨勢奈弖麻呂|lt=Neta Maro|lt_ja=奈弖麻呂|lt_de=Neta Maro|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Neta Maro|1=Kose no Natemaro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479771}} was conferred the Ranks of {{ill|Junior Second Rank|de|Junior Second Rank|ja|従二位|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Second Rank|qq=}} and [[:en:Dainagon|Dainagon]]. * In Year 1 of [[:en:Kōnin (era)|Kōnin]] ([[:en:810|810 AD]]) – {{ill|Kose Noashi|de|Kose Noashi|ja|巨勢野足|lt=Noashi|lt_ja=野足|lt_de=Noashi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Noashi|1=Kose no Notari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479784}} was reappointed as {{ill|Kurando-tō|de|Kurando-tō|ja|蔵人頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurando-tō|1=Kurōdonotō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11621873}}. * {{ill|Kose Chūzen|de|Kose Chūzen|ja|巨勢忠善|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Chūzen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} served the [[:en:Kishū Tokugawa family|Kishu Tokugawa Family]], and when [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshimune|Tokugawa Yoshimune]] became shogun, they became [[:en:Hatamoto|Hatamoto]]. Subsequently, {{ill|Kose Shishin|de|Kose Shishin|ja|巨勢至信|lt=Shishin|lt_ja=至信|lt_de=Shishin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Shishin|1=Kose Yukinobu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q24873474}} and {{ill|Kose Shichū|de|Kose Shichū|ja|巨勢至忠|lt=Shichū|lt_ja=至忠|lt_de=Shichū|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Shichū|1=Kose Yukitada|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q24873642}} (and so on) followed. == Genealogy == {{familytree/start|style=font-size:80%}} {{familytree |border=0| 001 |001=[[:en:Takenouchi no Sukune|Takenouchi no Sukune]]}} {{familytree |border=0| |!|}} {{familytree |border=0| 001 |001='''Kose'''{{ill|Kose Komagari Sukune|de|Kose Komagari Sukune|ja|許勢小柄宿禰|lt=Komagari Sukune|lt_ja=小柄宿禰|lt_de=Komagari revision.text:
[[ja:巨勢氏]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11479778]] Wikidata name: Kose clan [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:39, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11479778]] Wikidata name: Kose clan [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:18, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} ]] ) --> {{translated page|ja|巨勢氏|version=90698167|comment=Imported full ja history}} |始祖 = |出自 = |氏祖 = {{ill|Kose Komagari Sukune|de|Kose Komagari Sukune|ja|許勢小柄宿禰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Komagari Sukune|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 許勢小柄|1=Kose-no-Ogara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q18226524}}{{Sfn|太田|1934|p=2310}} |種別 = {{ill|Imperial Branch|de|Imperial Branch|ja|皇別|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Branch|1=Kōbetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11581000}} |本貫 = [[:en:Yamato Province|Yamato Province]][[:en:Takaichi District, Nara|Takaichi District]]Kose District (巨勢郷){{Sfn|太田|1934|p=2310}} |人物 = {{ill|Kose Otoko|de|Kose Otoko|ja|巨勢男人|lt=Man|lt_ja=男人|lt_de=Man|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Otoko|1=Kose Otoko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479782}}
{{ill|Kose Hirao|de|Kose Hirao|ja|巨勢比良夫|lt=Hirao|lt_ja=比良夫|lt_de=Hirao|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Hirao|1=Kose Hirao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q96715944}}
{{ill|Kose Tokuda|de|Kose Tokuda|ja|巨勢徳陀|lt=Tokuda|lt_ja=徳陀|lt_de=Tokuda|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Tokuda|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 巨勢徳多|1=Kose no Tokuta|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479774}}
{{ill|Kose Hito|de|Kose Hito|ja|巨勢人|lt=Hito|lt_ja=人|lt_de=Hito|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Hito|1=Kose no Hito|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479766}}
{{ill|Kose Neta Maro|de|Kose Neta Maro|ja|巨勢奈弖麻呂|lt=Neta Maro|lt_ja=奈弖麻呂|lt_de=Neta Maro|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Neta Maro|1=Kose no Natemaro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479771}}
{{ill|Kose Noashi|de|Kose Noashi|ja|巨勢野足|lt=Noashi|lt_ja=野足|lt_de=Noashi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Noashi|1=Kose no Notari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479784}}
[[:en:Kose Kanaoka|Kanaoka]]
{{ill|Jōen-in|de|Jōen-in|ja|浄円院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōen-in|1=Jōen-in|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6992748}} ? |後裔 = [[:en:Kishū Tokugawa family|Kishu Tokugawa Family]] subordinate [[:en:Hatamoto|Hatamoto]] 2 houses ([[:en:Buke|Buke]]) }} '''Kose Clan''' (巨勢氏) is a [[:en:Clan|clan]] that adopts “Kose” as its clan name. It was an [[:en:Ancient history|Ancient]] [[:en:Gōzoku|Powerful Clan]] based in [[:en:Yamato Province|Yamato Province]][[:en:Takaichi District, Nara|Takaichi District]]Kose District (巨勢郷) (present‐day [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]][[:en:Gose, Nara|Gose City]] Furuse (古瀬)){{Sfn|太田|1934|p=2310}}. The orthography of “Kose” is attested as '''Kose''' (許勢), , '''Kose''' (居勢), and {{Sfn|太田|1934|p=2310}}. The [[:en:Kabane|Surname]] was originally read as {{reading|[[:en:Omi (title)|Omi]]|o‑mi}}, and in the 13th year of [[:en:Emperor Tenmu|Emperor Tenmu]] ([[:en:684|684 AD]]), with the establishment of the {{ill|Eight Family Names|de|Acht Familiennamen|ja|八色の姓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Family Names|1=eight kabane system|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11391729}}, it was changed to the surname [[:en:Ason|Asomi]]{{Sfn|太田|1934|p=2311}}. == Overview == According to traditions such as the [[:en:Kiki|Kiki]], the clan is said to descend from [[:en:Emperor Kōgen|Emperor Kogen]], with its founder being {{ill|Kose Komagari Sukune|de|Kose Komagari Sukune|ja|許勢小柄宿禰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Komagari Sukune|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 許勢小柄|1=Kose-no-Ogara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q18226524}}, the second son of [[:en:Takenouchi no Sukune|Takenouchi no Sukune]]{{Sfn|太田|1934|p=2310}}. After the 6th Century [[:en:6th century|6th Century]], the clan emerged as a rising new power through its diplomatic and military engagements with the {{ill|Korean Peninsula|de|Koreanische Halbinsel|ja|朝鮮半島|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Korean Peninsula|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Korean Peninsula|WD=Q483134}}. Beginning with {{ill|Kose Otoko|de|Kose Otoko|ja|巨勢男人|lt=Man|lt_ja=男人|lt_de=Man|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Otoko|1=Kose Otoko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479782}}, who became a {{ill|Minister (Ancient Japan)|de|Minister (Altes Japan)|ja|大臣 (古代日本)|lt=Minister|lt_ja=大臣|lt_de=Minister|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minister (Ancient Japan)|1=Ōomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4328809}} in the reign of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]], followed by {{ill|Kose Inamochi|de|Kose Inamochi|ja|許勢稲持|lt=Inamochi|lt_ja=稲持|lt_de=Inamochi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Inamochi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 巨勢稲持|1=Kose Inamochi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q90866601}} in the reign of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Emperor Kinmei]], {{ill|Kose Saru|de|Kose Saru|ja|巨勢猿|lt=Saru|lt_ja=猿|lt_de=Saru|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Saru|1=Kose no Saru|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q66480252}} and {{ill|Kose Hirao|de|Kose Hirao|ja|巨勢比良夫|lt=Hirao|lt_ja=比良夫|lt_de=Hirao|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Hirao|1=Kose Hirao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q96715944}} in the reign of [[:en:Emperor Sushun|Emperor Sushun]], and {{ill|Kose Daimaro|de|Kose Daimaro|ja|許勢大摩呂|lt=Daimaro|lt_ja=大摩呂|lt_de=Daimaro|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Daimaro|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in the reign of [[:en:Empress Suiko|Empress Suiko]], members of the clan appear as officials of the [[:en:Taifu|Daihu]] (councilor) class{{Sfn|太田|1934|p=2311}}, though their genealogical relationships remain unclear. In the [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka Period]], during the reign of [[:en:Emperor Kōtoku|Emperor Kōtoku]], {{ill|Kose Tokuda|de|Kose Tokuda|ja|巨勢徳陀|lt=Tokuda|lt_ja=徳陀|lt_de=Tokuda|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Tokuda|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 巨勢徳多|1=Kose no Tokuta|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479774}} served as [[:en:Minister of the Left|Minister of the Left]], and in the reign of [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]], {{ill|Kose Hito|de|Kose Hito|ja|巨勢人|lt=Hito|lt_ja=人|lt_de=Hito|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Hito|1=Kose no Hito|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479766}} served as {{ill|Censorial Official|de|Zensor|ja|御史大夫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Censorial Official|1=yushi dafu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11071155}}; moreover, in the [[:en:Nara period|Nara Period]], {{ill|Kose Maro|de|Kose Maro|ja|巨勢麻呂|lt=Maro|lt_ja=麻呂|lt_de=Maro|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Maro|1=Kose no Maro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479786}} and {{ill|Kose Eji|de|Kose Eji|ja|巨勢邑治|lt=Eji|lt_ja=邑治|lt_de=Eji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Eji|1=Kose Eji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479785}} held the position of [[:en:Chūnagon|Chunagon]], while {{ill|Kose Neta Maro|de|Kose Neta Maro|ja|巨勢奈弖麻呂|lt=Neta Maro|lt_ja=奈弖麻呂|lt_de=Neta Maro|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Neta Maro|1=Kose no Natemaro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479771}} was promoted to [[:en:Dainagon|Dainagon]]{{Sfn|太田|1934|p=2311}}. In the early [[:en:Heian period|Heian Period]], after producing {{ill|Kose Noashi|de|Kose Noashi|ja|巨勢野足|lt=Noashi|lt_ja=野足|lt_de=Noashi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Noashi|1=Kose no Notari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479784}}, who was first appointed as {{ill|Kurando-tō|de|Kurando-tō|ja|蔵人頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurando-tō|1=Kurōdonotō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11621873}} and later promoted to [[:en:Chūnagon|Chunagon]], no other member rose to the level of court nobility. [[:en:Kose Kanaoka|Kanaoka]], the founder of the {{ill|Kose School|de|Kose Schule|ja|巨勢派|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose School|1=Kose school|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479780}}, was a great‑grandson of Noashi. == Developments == * Early 6th Century – In the reign of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]], {{ill|Kose Otoko|de|Kose Otoko|ja|巨勢男人|lt=Man|lt_ja=男人|lt_de=Man|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Otoko|1=Kose Otoko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479782}} became a [[:en:Minister (government)|Minister]], and his daughters {{ill|Sadehime|de|Sadehime|ja|紗手媛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadehime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|Kakayuhime|de|Kakayuhime|ja|香々有媛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakayuhime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} were married to [[:en:Emperor Ankan|Emperor Ankan]]. * In Year 2 of [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]] ([[:en:587|587 AD]]) – {{ill|Kose Hirao|de|Kose Hirao|ja|巨勢比良夫|lt=Hirao|lt_ja=比良夫|lt_de=Hirao|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Hirao|1=Kose Hirao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q96715944}} participated in the [[:en:Soga–Mononobe conflict|Teimei Rebellion]] and annihilated [[:en:Mononobe no Moriya|Mononobe Moriya]]. * In Year 5 of the [[:en:Taika (era)|Taika Era]] ([[:en:649|649 AD]]) – {{ill|Kose Tokuda|de|Kose Tokuda|ja|巨勢徳陀|lt=Tokuda|lt_ja=徳陀|lt_de=Tokuda|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Tokuda|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 巨勢徳多|1=Kose no Tokuta|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479774}} became [[:en:Minister of the Left|Minister of the Left]]. * In Year 1 of [[:en:Emperor Tenmu|Emperor Tenmu]] ([[:en:672|672 AD]]) – {{ill|Kose Hito|de|Kose Hito|ja|巨勢人|lt=Hito|lt_ja=人|lt_de=Hito|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Hito|1=Kose no Hito|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479766}} sided with the Omi faction in the [[:en:Jinshin War|Jinshin War]] and was sentenced to [[:en:Exile|Exile]]. * In Year 13 of Emperor Tenmu ([[:en:684|684 AD]]) – {{ill|Kose Kuromaro|de|Kose Kuromaro|ja|巨勢黒麻呂|lt=Kuromaro|lt_ja=黒麻呂|lt_de=Kuromaro|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Kuromaro|1=Kose no Kuromaro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q109287613}} and {{ill|Kose Shitan|de|Kose Shitan|ja|巨勢紫檀|lt=Shitan|lt_ja=紫檀|lt_de=Shitan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Shitan|1=Kose Shitan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30932551}} were granted the surname [[:en:Ason|Asomi]]. * In Year 1 of [[:en:Tenpyō-shōhō|Tenpyō Shōhō]] ([[:en:749|749 AD]]) – {{ill|Kose Neta Maro|de|Kose Neta Maro|ja|巨勢奈弖麻呂|lt=Neta Maro|lt_ja=奈弖麻呂|lt_de=Neta Maro|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Neta Maro|1=Kose no Natemaro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479771}} was conferred the Ranks of {{ill|Junior Second Rank|de|Junior Second Rank|ja|従二位|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Second Rank|qq=}} and [[:en:Dainagon|Dainagon]]. * In Year 1 of [[:en:Kōnin (era)|Kōnin]] ([[:en:810|810 AD]]) – {{ill|Kose Noashi|de|Kose Noashi|ja|巨勢野足|lt=Noashi|lt_ja=野足|lt_de=Noashi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Noashi|1=Kose no Notari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479784}} was reappointed as {{ill|Kurando-tō|de|Kurando-tō|ja|蔵人頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurando-tō|1=Kurōdonotō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11621873}}. * {{ill|Kose Chūzen|de|Kose Chūzen|ja|巨勢忠善|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Chūzen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} served the [[:en:Kishū Tokugawa family|Kishu Tokugawa Family]], and when [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshimune|Tokugawa Yoshimune]] became shogun, they became [[:en:Hatamoto|Hatamoto]]. Subsequently, {{ill|Kose Shishin|de|Kose Shishin|ja|巨勢至信|lt=Shishin|lt_ja=至信|lt_de=Shishin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Shishin|1=Kose Yukinobu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q24873474}} and {{ill|Kose Shichū|de|Kose Shichū|ja|巨勢至忠|lt=Shichū|lt_ja=至忠|lt_de=Shichū|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Shichū|1=Kose Yukitada|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q24873642}} (and so on) followed. == Genealogy == {{familytree/start|style=font-size:80%}} {{familytree |border=0| 001 |001=[[:en:Takenouchi no Sukune|Takenouchi no Sukune]]}} {{familytree |border=0| |!|}} {{familytree |border=0| 001 |001='''Kose'''{{ill|Kose Komagari Sukune|de|Kose Komagari Sukune|ja|許勢小柄宿禰|lt=Komagari Sukune|lt_ja=小柄宿禰|lt_de=Komagari Sukune|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kose Komagari Sukune|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 許勢小柄|1=Kose-no-Ogara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q18226524}}}} {{familytree |border=0|
